metadata.title: Good Luck Charm
metadata.lyrics:
[00:00.32] Aa-ah-ah
[00:02.35] Aa-ah-ah
[00:04.36] Aa-ah-ah
[00:06.18] Oh, yeah
[00:09.07] Don't want a four-leaf clover
[00:13.06] Don't want an old horse shoe
[00:16.97] Want your kiss, 'cause I just can't miss
[00:20.46] With a good luck charm like you
[00:23.42] Come on and be my little good luck charm
[00:28.31] Ah-ah, you sweet delight
[00:32.25] I want a good luck charm a-hanging on my arm
[00:36.54] A-to have (a-to have), to hold (to hold)
[00:40.48] A-tonight
[00:45.05] Don't want a silver dollar
[00:49.09] Rabbit's foot on a string
[00:52.92] The happiness in your warm caress
[00:56.58] No rabbit's foot can bring
[00:59.53] Come on and be my little good luck charm
[01:04.48] Ah-ah-ah, you sweet delight
[01:08.35] I want a good luck charm a-hanging on my arm

[01:44.35] Your love is worth all the gold on earth
[01:47.84] No wonder that I say
[01:50.58] Come on and be my little good luck charm
[01:55.53] Ah-ah-ah, you sweet delight
[01:59.42] I want a good luck charm a-hanging on my arm
